summary: Created `src/domain/url-seed.ts` with `readSeedFromUrl()` (parses `?seed=` from URL) and `writeSeedToUrl()` (uses `history.replaceState` to set seed without reload, preserving other params). Created `src/domain/resolve-seed.ts` with `resolveSeed()` that passes through valid seeds and generates new ones for null/invalid input. Wired both into `src/main.ts` so every page load reads, resolves, and writes the seed to the URL. All 174 tests pass (6 suites), lint and typecheck clean.
